description: Wide fabric straps with brand name embroidered on the medial strap and, striped and padded on the lateral one Twill cushioned fabric toe separator to hold the foot in place with much ease Soft, cushioned textured rubber footbed with brand logo partially printed Single piece cushioned rubber footbed and outsole for all-day comfort Brand bunny face logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces
